metadata.title: Open to Work: How to Get Ahead in the Age of AI
metadata.description: Today is the day. Open to Work: How to Get Ahead in the Age of AI is officially available! At a time when technology dominates the headlines, the conversation I see most often on LinkedIn is deeply human: what does AI mean for my job and my career?
metadata.author: Ryan Roslansky

summary.notes: This blog article is almost entirely default content — heading, image, paragraphs with links. Only the Related Blogs sidebar uses a block (cards-blog, already exists). No new blocks needed.
